I'll review my project report and code to identify the relevant database concepts and techniques I developed, and then research healthcare data management challenges to identify areas where my knowledge can make a meaningful impact. I understand that evaluating an influencer's authenticity is crucial. I've had a similar experience when I helped my friend launch her social media campaign for her sustainable fashion brand. We made sure to create content that was authentic and aligned with her brand values, and it really paid off. The campaign was a huge success, and her followers increased by over 50% in just one week. I think it's essential to find influencers who genuinely care about the products or services they're promoting.

Rewrite and paraphrase the following paragraph for Addis Ababa city, ethiopia without changing the nomenclature without losing citation and references in the paragraph
The rapid growth in urbanization, industrialization, transportation,
population and fossil fuel emission has adversely worsened the air
quality globally (Bozdag˘ et al., 2020). Air pollution is a major environmental problem in developing southeast Asian nations, especially
Malaysia, whose goal is to be an industrialized country soon (Juneng
et al., 2009). According to Kamarul Zaman et al. (2017), Malaysia is
ranked 117th among 180 countries with the worst air quality. In addition, the spatial location of Malaysia along the emitted pollutants’
pathway has contributed severely to air pollution (Reid et al., 2013),
especially emission from a forest fire and transboundary pollution
(Usmani et al., 2020).
Malaysia’s Air Pollution Index (API) is calculated using the concentration of carbon monoxide (CO), nitrogen dioxide (NO2), ozone (O3),
sulphur dioxide (SO2), particulate matter (PM) with a diameter finer
than 10 μm and Particulate Matter <2.5 μm (PM2.5) (APIMS 2019).
Despite the present utilization of PM2.5 to denote the API level in
Malaysia (APIMS 2020), PM10 sourced from vehicles’ soot, biomass
burning, and industrial emission remain a threat to health (Khan et al.,
2016). This is due to its small aerodynamic particulate diameter, which
can easily penetrate the lungs and respiratory system, resulting in
adverse health effects (Tella and Balogun, 2021).

I'll start with the Coursera specialization and see how that goes, and then I can adjust my schedule as needed. I also want to make sure I'm applying what I learn to my work and daily life, so I'll try to set aside some time to reflect on what I've learned and think about how I can use it in practical ways.

It's also good to know that there are tools like RescueTime and Todoist that can help with time management. I might check those out and see if they can help me stay on track. And I've heard of the Pomodoro Technique before, so I might give that a try too.

Thanks for the recommendations and advice! I think I have a good starting point now.
